学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranked approximately 92nd in 2026 (86 in 2021 → 88 in 2022 → 87 in 2023 → 86 in 2024 → 88 in 2025 → 92 in 2026), with a slight decline in recent years but overall stability; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, involving a controversy over the professional ethics of a professor in the College of Literature; its overall popularity ranking on Douyin is 100th, with a rating of 'average', and short video exposure is at a medium-low level; no obvious records of admission cut-off breaks; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Foreign Language and Literature was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at this university; other enrollment majors (mathematics, physics, biology, electronic information, etc.) did not enter the A- or above rating, indicating generally average discipline precision.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication majors are highly recommended with social heat, aligning with the university's physics category enrollment majors (electronic information science and technology, mathematics and applied mathematics, information and computing science, etc.); teacher training/education majors have divided popularity and are under observation; the total number of examinees in Ningxia in 2026 is about 66,000, a slight increase from 2025 (65,897), intensifying competition slightly; Hunan Normal University is located in Changsha City, Hunan Province, with a small enrollment scale in Ningxia (14 in physics category), making it a cross-provincial enrollment; Ningxia's local 211 is Ningxia University, and Hunan Normal University, as an out-of-province 211 normal university, has some regional appeal to Ningxia examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous forward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight increase in total examinees, the negative reputation evaluation, and the slight decline in Soft Science rankings, based on the 2025 baseline of 4722, competition is expected to intensify slightly but to a limited extent; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4752, with a range of 4252–5252.
